appName.message: Bulk Delete Gmail Emails - Gmail One-Click Cleaner
appName.description: Extension name shown in the browser and as the store listing title.

appDesc.message: Free up Gmail storage fast. Bulk delete old emails, large attachments & promos. Bulk unsubscribe from lists, schedules & undo.
appDesc.description: Store listing summary. Hard cap 132 characters.

pinHintText.message: Pin the toolbar icon for one-click monthly cleans.

srcWarnText.message: This copy was installed by third-party software, not from an official store. If that was not you, remove it and reinstall from the store. Scheduled sweeps stay off on this copy.

snoozeOneDay.message: Schedules snoozed (~1 day left). Manual runs still work.

snoozeManyDays.message: Schedules snoozed (~$1 days left). Manual runs still work.

accessText.message: Allow access to mail.google.com so the cleaner can run. No other site is touched.

smartHint.message: One read-only scan finds the senders worth cleaning and says why. Starred mail, whitelisted senders and people you actually write to are never suggested.

smartBulkSub.message: Tagged first, then Trash - undo applies

smartUpsellNone.message: Pro is $$9.99 once: it unlocks the full suggestion list and bulk apply.

smartUpsellOne.message: 1 more suggestion ready. Pro unlocks the full list and applies them in bulk for $$9.99.

smartUpsellMany.message: $1 more suggestions ready. Pro unlocks the full list and applies them in bulk for $$9.99.

smartUpsellTail.message: The top picks above stay free forever.

reassuranceSummary.message: How it works · safe by design

reassur2.message: so you can undo, then moves matches to Trash or Archive.

monthlySub.message: Old promos & junk, safe for repeat use

monthlyHintSr.message: Run a safe monthly cleanup targeting old promotions and junk mail

targetGroupLabel.message: Target one category for this run

autopilotHint.message: Archives new clutter for you once a week. Tagged first, archive only, Restore applies.

apUpsellNone.message: Pro is $$9.99 once: Auto-Pilot keeps your inbox clean every week, automatically.

apUpsellOne.message: 1 suggestion is sitting here right now. Auto-Pilot sweeps them for you every week on Pro ($$9.99 once).

apUpsellMany.message: $1 suggestions are sitting here right now. Auto-Pilot sweeps them for you every week on Pro ($$9.99 once).

intLight.message: Light · Very safe, mainly junk & old attachments

intensityHintSr.message: Choose how aggressively to clean your inbox

actionHintSr.message: Choose what to do with matched emails

ageHintSr.message: Only clean emails older than this age

dryRunHint.message: See what happens without touching mail

reviewHint.message: Pause and confirm each query first

recapStatic.message: Recap: your last cleanup finished while the popup was closed.

recapDynamic.message: Recap: your last cleanup finished $1, while the popup was closed.

resultNote.message: Nothing permanently deleted, Gmail keeps Trash for 30 days. You can restore anytime.

subsHint.message: Deleting hides old mail; unsubscribing stops new mail. The free scan lists every sender that mails you, then Pro unsubscribes from the ones you pick using Gmail's own Unsubscribe control.

subsUpsellNone.message: One $$9.99 payment unlocks bulk unsubscribe forever.

subsUpsellOne.message: Found 1 mailing list emailing you. Pro unsubscribes from the ones you pick for $$9.99.

subsUpsellMany.message: Found $1 mailing lists emailing you. Pro unsubscribes from the ones you pick for $$9.99.

subsUpsellTail.message: No subscription, no account, and the key is verified on your device.

xrayHint.message: See which senders eat your Gmail storage. The free scan sizes up large mail and reports a floor estimate; Pro purges the hogs you pick. Purged mail is tagged first and lands in Trash, so the 30-day safety net applies as usual.

xrayProSub.message: Pro · $$9.99 once (Google One is $$20 every year)

xrayUpsellNone.message: Pro is $$9.99 once: it unlocks the full ranked list and one-click purge.

xrayUpsellOne.message: 1 sender is holding at least $1. Pro purges the ones you pick for $$9.99.

xrayUpsellMany.message: $1 senders are holding at least $2. Pro purges the ones you pick for $$9.99.

xrayUpsellTail.message: Google One wants $$20 every year for more storage.

xrayLockedTail.message: - Pro unlocks the full list and one-click purge.

proPromoBody.message: bulk unsubscribe, storage purge, Auto-Pilot. Everything free stays free.

onbP1.message: Bulk-clean Gmail in one click. Here's the safe-by-default flow:

onbLi1.message: Matching mail is tagged with a label first.

onbLi2.message: Items go to Trash by default (30-day safety net).

onbLi3.message: Starred and Important threads are skipped.

onbP2.message: A few tips before your first run:

onbLi5.message: Build custom rules and schedules on the Rules page.

onbLi6b.message: any time to see keyboard shortcuts.

btnMovingArchiveSub.message: tagging then moving to all mail

deepConfirmSub.message: click again to run it - dry run is the safe preview

deepConfirmStatus.message: deep targets many categories - click run again to confirm

allowAccessStatus.message: allow Gmail access above, then run again

allowAccessFirst.message: Allow Gmail access at the top of this popup first.

otherPopupToast.message: another popup just started a cleanup

cleanupCompleteToast.message: Cleanup complete! View recovery log in Stats to undo.

layoutChangedToast.message: open Diagnostics (footer) for run details and updates

looksRunningStatus.message: looks like a cleanup is already running

gmailOpening.message: No Gmail tab open. Opening Gmail for you...

gmailOpenFailed.message: Could not open Gmail. Open mail.google.com and try again.

gmailTabClosedEarly.message: The Gmail tab closed before it finished loading.

gmailSignInFirst.message: Sign in to Gmail in the tab that just opened, then run again.

gmailTooSlow.message: Gmail is taking too long to load. Try again in a moment.

targetCleared.message: target cleared - using full rule set

subsScanning.message: Scanning your mailbox for subscription senders...

pickOneSender.message: pick at least one sender first

firstTwentyFive.message: running the first 25; re-run for the rest

purgeDryCounting.message: Dry run: counting what a purge would remove...

smartScanning.message: Scanning for suggestions (this one takes a minute or two)...

smartDryCounting.message: Dry run: counting what this suggestion would clean...

noSafeRule.message: could not build a safe rule for this sender

pickOneSuggestion.message: pick at least one suggestion first

apSweepRunning.message: A sweep is running right now.

apLastSweepDry.message: Last sweep would have archived $1 emails, $2.

apFirstSweepSoon.message: First sweep runs soon as a preview. Nothing is archived until you confirm below.

apPreviewConfirm.message: Auto-Pilot preview: would have archived $1 emails. Turn on for real?

apOnToast.message: Auto-Pilot on - the first sweep is a preview

apNeedsPro.message: Auto-Pilot needs an active Pro license

apLiveToast.message: Auto-Pilot is live - weekly sweeps now archive for real

permDeniedToast.message: permission denied; reload Gmail and retry

checkoutFailedToast.message: could not open checkout - use the Get Pro link

notifDryBody.message: Dry run finished. No mail was touched.

notifLiveBody.message: Estimated ~$1 MB freed. Open Stats for details.
